prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen3 (CJXB/CJXC)** engine with **APR Carbon Fiber Intake System**, **APR Catted Downpipe (3.5" diameter)**, and **Garrett GT2867RS turbocharger** (hybridized with billet compressor wheel) pushing **380-400 HP** and **450-480 Nm** on **98 RON fuel** with **APR High-Pressure Fuel Pump** and **Bosch Motorsport 0261002037 injectors**

034 Motorsport **Engine Mount Inserts (70A durometer)** paired with **034 Motorsport Transmission Mount Insert** to eliminate **EA888 torque steer** under full boost, combined with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (valved specifically for the **MQB platform**) with **H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear sway bars** and **034 Motorsport Subframe Collar Kit** for chassis rigidity

Wagner Tuning **Competition Intercooler (FMIC) with 100% aluminum core (70mm thick)** and **custom silicone hoses (4-ply aramid, 3" diameter)** from **Vargas Turbo Technologies**, paired with **AWE Track Edition Cat-Back Exhaust (dual 3.5" tips, resonated)** and **Milltek Sport 200-cell race catalytic converter** for **Euro 6 compliance** while maintaining **<5% backpressure** at full load
estetica: Rocket Bunny **V3 widebody kit (8V-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (25mm extended front, 35mm rear)**, **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-piece)**, and **custom front splitter (20mm overhang, 3K twill carbon)** with **APR GT300 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1200mm span, adjustable angle)** for **120kg downforce at 180km/h**

OEM+ **Audi RS3 8V front bumper (8V.5 facelift, part #8V0071151B)** with **custom LED DRLs (Lux H8 V4, 5000K, sequential turn signals)** and **RS3-style side skirts (painted in Nardo Gray, part #8V0071301F)**, paired with **BBS LM-R 19x9.5 ET35 (front) / 19x10.5 ET40 (rear)** wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (245/35/19 front, 265/30/19 rear)**

Full **interior carbon fiber overhaul** with **Recaro Pole Position (PP) seats (cloth/Alcantara, part #8V0880209A)** and **custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point, bolt-in, by Custom Cages UK)**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, flat-bottom)**, and **AEM X-Series 30-0300 wideband AFR gauge (mounted in A-pillar)** with **Defi BF-series oil pressure/temperature gauges (pod-mounted in center console)**
